message:
perf(widgets): add thread-local paragraph metrics and wrap caching

Introduce LRU-evicting caches for paragraph text metrics and wrapped-line
results keyed by content hash, wrap mode, and width. Avoids redundant
re-measurement and re-wrapping on repeated renders of unchanged paragraphs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
